creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Simon, hi Alexander,

please see the message quoted below. Any news on the icc update [1]?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/108795

----- Forwarded message from Eric De La Cruz Lugo <eric_delacruz@yahoo.com> -----

From: Eric De La Cruz Lugo <eric_delacruz@yahoo.com>
Subject: icc  Current Status
To: stefan@freebsd.org
Cc: freebsd-ports-bugs@freebsd.org
Date: Thu, 1 Jan 2009 19:39:32 -0800 (PST)

> Hi, Stefan:
> I
> was wondering about the Status for the intel Compiler "icc V. 10 " ,
> there are any news about it?
> I am into a cluster (HPC) project for this Year (2009), and am trying to
> install FreeBSD 7 or 6.4 at least, but one requierement for the Physics
> and Math Guys is the Intel Compiler.
>
> Thanks in advance on this.
> Eric De La Cruz Lugo
> Merida, Yucatan, Mexico.

----- End forwarded message -----
